conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The tone of the email must remain formal throughout.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "What's up with my laptop?"
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The tone of the email must remain formal throughout. The email must include the phrase "What's up with my laptop?"
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Repair Status - [Your Laptop Model/Service Order Number]

Dear [Repair Shop Name] Service Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully inquire about the current status of a laptop that was submitted for repair on [Date you dropped off the laptop]. The details pertaining to this service are:

* **Laptop Make and Model:** [Your Laptop Make and Model, e.g., Dell XPS 13]
* **Service Order Number (if applicable):** [Your Service Order Number]
* **Description of Issue:** [Briefly state the issue, e.g., Screen replacement, Battery failure]

I understand that repairs can take time, but I would appreciate an update on the progress of the work and an estimated timeline for its completion. What's up with my laptop?

Could you please provide an update on whether the repairs have been completed, if any further parts are needed, or if there is an anticipated date when I can expect to collect the device?

Thank you very much for your time and attention to this matter. I look forward to your prompt reply.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>
